metadata.description: Name of the environment (e.g., dev, staging, prod)
Primary location for all resources
Optional explicit resource group name. Leave empty to use rg-<environmentName>.
Optional naming prefix for resources. Use letters and numbers only; separators are stripped automatically.
Azure OpenAI model name to deploy
Azure OpenAI model version
Fallback Azure OpenAI model if primary is not available
Fallback model version
Azure OpenAI API version
Cosmos DB database name
Allow public network access to ACR (for temporary dev pushes)
Entra ID app registration client ID for Easy Auth (leave empty to disable auth)
Entra ID tenant ID for Easy Auth (defaults to deployment tenant when empty)
Entra ID app registration client secret for Easy Auth token store and delegated ARM tokens
Developer public IP address for resource firewall rules (empty to keep fully private)
SKU used for model deployments (e.g., GlobalStandard for GPT-5 family)
Capacity for each model deployment
Developer public IP address for firewall rule (empty to keep fully private)

fallbackDeploymentName.value: [if(parameters('existingAccount'), format('{0}-fallback', parameters('fallbackModel')), if(not(equals(parameters('modelName'), parameters('fallbackModel'))), format('{0}-fallback', parameters('fallbackModel')), ''))]

metadata.description: Also create regional Cosmos private DNS A record (host-suffix)
IP addresses to use for the regional Cosmos private DNS record (optional)
Developer public IP address for firewall rule (empty to keep fully private)

variables.aadLogin: [if(not(empty(parameters('authClientSecret'))), createObject('loginParameters', createArray('response_type=code id_token', 'scope=openid profile email offline_access https://management.azure.com/user_impersonation')), null())]

configuration.secrets: [concat(if(not(empty(parameters('containerRegistryName'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'acr-password', 'value', listCredentials(resourceId('Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries', parameters('containerRegistryName')), '2023-01-01-preview').passwords[0].value)), createArray()), if(not(empty(parameters('authClientSecret'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'auth-client-secret', 'value', parameters('authClientSecret'))), createArray()))]

variables.aadLogin: [if(not(empty(parameters('authClientSecret'))), createObject('loginParameters', createArray('response_type=code id_token', 'scope=openid profile email offline_access https://management.azure.com/user_impersonation')), null())]

configuration.secrets: [concat(if(not(empty(parameters('containerRegistryName'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'acr-password', 'value', listCredentials(resourceId('Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries', parameters('containerRegistryName')), '2023-01-01-preview').passwords[0].value)), createArray()), if(not(empty(parameters('authClientSecret'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'auth-client-secret', 'value', parameters('authClientSecret'))), createArray()))]

metadata.description: Cosmos DB account name
Principal ID to assign the role to
Role definition ID
ACR name to scope the role assignment
ACR name to scope the role assignment
